CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-10-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for defendant Fedex Grounds. Notice having been given and there being no other appearance nor objection filed, and no objection by counsel appearing in court today, the court orders the balance of this case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)
